case_title: CRAVEN, CAITLIN vs. BYRNE, MONICA IND/DBA NOVEMBER CAFE AND/OR

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRAVEN, CAITLIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYRNE, MONICA IND/DBA NOVEMBER CAFE AND/OR NOVEMBER AT GHIRARDELLI SQUARE $2,076.63 PRINCIPAL, $93.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,169.63

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRAVEN, CAITLIN AS TO DEFENDANT BYRNE, MONICA IND/DBA NOVEMBER CAFE AND/OR NOVEMBER AT GHIRARDELLI SQUARE
